step_rationale: Lipoxygenase lipid mediator driving inflammatory and oxidative responses in AMI.
mechanism: Lipoxygenase metabolite amplifying inflammation and oxidative stress in acute myocardial infarction.

references.title: Biomarkers in the early period of acute myocardial infarction in rat serum and protective effects of Shexiang Baoxin Pill using a metabolomic method.
